assignments.name: email_body
email_body
assignments.value:
=Hello Slava,

Here is your Mortgage Payment Plan based on the current Madad Rate:

📅 COMPLETE MONTH-BY-MONTH PAYMENT SCHEDULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
{{ $('Calculate Mortgage Payment Plan Madad').item.json.paymentSchedule.map((p, i) => `Month ${p.month}: Payment ₪${p.payment.toLocaleString()} | Principal ₪${p.principal.toLocaleString()} | Interest ₪${p.interest.toLocaleString()} | Balance ₪${p.remainingBalance.toLocaleString()}`).join('\n') }}

This plan is calculated based on the current prime rate and assumes fixed interest for the entire loan period.

Best regards,
Your Mortgage Calculator

parameters.subject: Complete Mortgage Payment Plan - Prime Rate + Full Monthly Breakdown

nodes.name: Insert result madad to summary table
